name: Sauteed Bean Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu into rectangles measuring 1 1/2 inches by 3/4 inch by 3/4 inch. Dry the tofu thoroughly.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Add half of the tofu to the wok and cook for 3 minutes, turning occasionally.
4. Flip the tofu and cook for another 3 minutes on the other side.
5. Using a slotted spoon, remove the cooked tofu from the wok and place it on a warmed serving platter.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 with the remaining tofu.
7. Serve hot with sauce.
